spur_handling: single-EOL only; do not parallel sub-spurs
note: Adds-on board for legacy conventional zones — F100 is primarily addressable, EOL applies to the conventional input cards.

spur_handling: single EOL at the last device; parallel-tee branches require SCI module per branch
note: Verify against PFS configuration; some firmware uses 10k for SCI-equipped circuits.

spur_handling: single EOL at the far device
note: Conventional 16-zone — every zone needs an EOL; missing EOL throws zone-fault on power-up.

spur_handling: EOL at the last device; tee-offs require sounder isolators
note: Verify against the panel commissioning data — some firmware variants accept 4k7.

spur_handling: EOL at the last device; replace EOL when re-terminating
note: Spare EOL boards becoming scarce on legacy SP1 — keep a stock.

spur_handling: single EOL at last device
note: ID3000 SACs use 4k7 typical; loop-powered sounders use SCI EOL on the loop.

spur_handling: Class B: single EOL last device. Class A: ring with no EOL.
note: VeriFire defines circuit class — NAC type set per output card; verify card supports Class A before wiring as ring.

spur_handling: Class A or B per circuit definition in 4100ES PC tool
note: Simplex IDNet+ uses on-card EOL; some variants ship with 10k EOL fitted.

spur_handling: EOL at far device; SCI per spur branch
note: Standard MX1 SAC; verify against 'site-installed-as-built' EOL value before fault-finding.

spur_handling: single EOL last device
note: Legacy FP1100 — confirm against site as-built; some variants use 10k.

polarity: polarised — line monitoring on quiescent state
spur_handling: single EOL on the run; tap branches share the EOL on the trunk
note: Verify line resistance on commissioning; tap count affects the line-imbalance threshold.

spur_handling: EOL at last device
note: Verify against FPA-1200 commissioning data; LSN loop devices use loop-protocol monitoring not EOL.

spur_handling: EOL at last device; ESP loop devices use loop monitoring
note: Confirm EOL value in the FireNET commissioning sheet — some variants use 10k for higher impedance lines.

spur_handling: single EOL last device
note: Older BC-series. Check site as-built; legacy installs sometimes substituted 10k for low-current sounders.

spur_handling: single EOL last device
note: F3200/F4000 era — common to find aged 1/2 W EOLs that have drifted; replace if reading > ±5%.

spur_handling: EOL at last device; sounder spurs need SCI per branch
note: Loop Explorer config drives EOL value — confirm before swapping.

spur_handling: Signature loop monitoring; NAC per output card
note: Signature Series uses 47k EOL on signature lines; NAC EOLs typically 4k7 — verify card config.

spur_handling: single EOL last device
note: FX-2000 NAC — verify against site config tool.

spur_handling: single EOL last device
note: Legacy ZP3; replacement EOLs increasingly hard to source — keep van stock.

spur_handling: single EOL last device
note: Verify against GST-200N installation manual; vendor-specific EOL boards available.

spur_handling: single EOL last device
note: Morley DXc — IAS tool defines circuit class.

spur_handling: single EOL last device
note: Confirm against Previdia tool — some new firmware uses 10k.
